calendar.matters:
REPORT OF SALE AND PETITION TO CONFIRM SALE OF REAL PROPERTY (2661-2663 Greenwich Street, San Francisco, Ca 94123)
Off Calendar Apr-21-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Avid ALvai appeared via zoom for Scott Hodges (petioner).
Dennis Otto (Compass Realty) appeared in person for and with Fiona McGrath-Pancha (buyer).

The sale was confirmed at $2,679, 900.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed 02/23/26. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property. The matter is under submission with the intent to grant. No additional bond is required.

Judge: Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Fajardo. Not reported.
